types: Device information (device ID, IMEI, serial number, model, OS)
Usage data (app usage, feature usage, interaction patterns)
Biometric data (fingerprint, iris, face, if device has scanners)
Health data (from wearables or health apps)
Call logs and SMS history (if permission granted)

label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. Samsung Galaxy ecosystem collects extensive device and biometric data. Biometrics (fingerprint, face, iris) are CCPA-sensitive data. Health data from wearables is particularly sensitive. Wide range of permissions for contact, location, and media access. Cross-device tracking across Samsung ecosystem.
